findings.title: Over-capacity risk
findings.why: The confirmed guest count exceeds venue capacity. An error in attending count (Levi Family) artificially inflates the numbers.
findings.do: Rectify the Levi Family's attending count discrepancy; reassess the headcount.

findings.title: Overdue RSVPs & Ambiguous Plus-Ones
findings.why: Critical households still pending response, plus ambiguous plus-one offers.
findings.do: Chase RSVPs from Friedman, Azoulay, Goldstein, Sharabi, Dahan, Malka, Biton, Ohana families; clarify plus-one for Friedman and Goldstein.
